reviews.review_msg: Instead of swearing in class maybe Brent can grow a brain and think rationally.

209 should not be a hard class but Brent makes it impossible to do anything and only his words are correct. Absolute disgrace to the earth sciences for Brent to command such opinions and respect after he deliberately changes plans on student's and cuts class time. Absolute worst prof

Obviously the same student is writing such hurtful comments across the sfu easc department out of their own experience, but don't let this person trick you into fearing easc profs. Although a tough grader, Brent was an extremely supportive and hilarious prof, one of my favs and always made sure to thoroughly answer my plethora of questions.

Taught me 209W last fall and I still get nightmares of his exams. Extremely tough and unfair. On the field trips he would also give zero instruction and just stand and relax, absolute disgrace to SFU!
Brent and that American politician are like the same thing it's unsettling! He better retire soon it would do everyone wonders, he's absolutely terrible!!!

His head is in the wrong galaxy 95% of the time, yikes. His is rude to students like to an unimaginable point as well it's extremely unthinkable, brutal professor I don't know how he's allowed to teach
RUINS COURSES, won't let us do anything.

Brent is an amazing teacher, and he's one of the funniest profs I've had. His teaching style is engaging enough that you wouldn't want to miss class! He isn't very clear on his lecture schedule, and his tests are heavy on textbook case studies. He takes a long time to give back tests and assignments, but his tests are not too awfully difficult.
